Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface NumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<NumberValidator<T>,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<NumberValidator<T>,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<NumberValidator<T>,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
NumberValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorNoOp
public interface NumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<NumberValidator<T>,T>
Validates the requirements of for a Number.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectValidator) imply ExtensibleObjectValidator.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableValidator

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberValidator

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs
